{"query":"Megalopolis graphic novel release date Abrams ComicArts October 2025 delayed Image Comics Syzygy Publishing","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1837,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://comicbookclublive.com/2025/10/07/chris-ryall-and-jacob-phillips-go-back-to-the-club-for-megalopolis-an-original-graphic-novel/","title":"Chris Ryall And Jacob Phillips Go Back To The Club For ‘Megalopolis: An Original Graphic Novel’","content":"Back in 2024, director Francis Ford Coppola released a movie he had been waiting his whole life to make:*Megalopolis*, an epic tale of an architect played by Adam Driver battling a corrupt mayor played by Giancarlo Esposito for the soul of their city.
Next live show, October 21, 2025 at 7 pm ET: Peglo ("To The Stars And Back") and Ben Passmore ("Black Arms To Hold You Up")!"},{"url":"https://www.indiewire.com/news/general-news/francis-ford-coppola-megalopolis-graphic-novel-1235118265/","title":"Francis Ford Coppola to Release 'Megalopolis' Graphic Novel","content":"The book inspired by his ambitious, allegorical film starring Adam Driver will be released in October 2025.
The book will be written by Chris Ryall, who has adapted Stephen King, Clive Barker, and Harlan Ellison’s works as well.
“Megalopolis” starred Adam Driver as architect Cesar Catilina, who strives to create a utopian city while battling Mayor Franklyn Cicero (Giancarlo Esposito).
Nathalie Emmanuel, Jon Voight, Laurence Fishburne, and Aubrey Plaza co-starred in the Cannes feature that Coppola self-funded for $120 million."},{"url":"https://www.sfchronicle.com/entertainment/article/coppola-megalopolis-graphic-novel-20292644.php","title":"Francis Ford Coppola unveils ‘Megalopolis,’ the graphic novel","content":"Adam Driver, left, and Nathalie Emmanuel star in director Francis Ford Coppola’s “Megalopolis,” which is being adapted into a graphic novel.
Coppola revealed that he has signed off on “Francis Ford Coppola’s Megalopolis: An Original Graphic Novel,” which is set to be published by Abrams ComicArts, a division of Abrams Books, in October.
“I hoped the graphic novel would take its own flight, with its own artists and writer so that it would be a sibling of the film, rather than just an echo,” Coppola said in a statement to the Hollywood Reporter posted Thursday, April 24.
San Francisco sees two wins at the 2026 James Beard Awards"},{"url":"https://www.abramsbooks.com/product/francis-ford-coppolas-megalopolis_9781419787126/","title":"Francis Ford Coppola's Megalopolis (Hardcover) | ABRAMS","content":"Megalopolis: An Original Graphic Novel is a unique 160-page graphic novel that presents an alternate version of Francis Ford Coppola’s visionary film, created and written by Francis Ford Coppola, adapted by Chris Ryall in collaboration with Coppola, and illustrated by Eisner Award–nominated cartoonist Jacob Phillips.
"the distinctive visual look, including the costumes, production design and cinematography did generally draw praise, and could be seen as a strong foundation for a graphic novel presentation."
Chris Ryall was the longtime chief creative officer, editor in chief, and writer for IDW Publishing.
London-based Jacob Phillips is the artist and colorist on Megalopolis; the cocreator, artist, and colorist of That Texas Blood, The Enfield Gang Massacre, and Newburn; and is an Eisner-nominated colorist on books such as Reckless, Criminal, and Night Fever."},{"url":"https://www.comicsbeat.com/graphic-novel-review-does-francis-ford-coppolas-megalopolis-work-as-a-graphic-novel/","title":"Graphic Novel Review: Does Francis Ford Coppola's MEGALOPOLIS work as a graphic novel?","content":"By all accounts, this is a very standard comic book page.
In terms of graphic language and adaptation, this has the problem of trying to depict a scene that in its initial context hinged on movement within a static medium.
Rejecting the traditional image of the comic book in favor of something truly strange."},{"url":"https://imagecomics.com/comics/releases/2025/10","title":"October 2025 | Releases","content":"October 2025 Releases ; 68 Compendium TP, Vol. 1 cover 68 Compendium TP, Vol. 1 ; All Negro Comics Americas First Black Comic Book TP, Book 1 cover All Negro ...Read more"}]}
